content = open\('/Users/andrewhall/Documents/GitHub/mimir/pkg/querier/blocks_store_queryable_search_test.go'\).read\(\)

old = '''\\t\\t\\tvs, err := q.SearchLabelNames\(ctx, tc.hints\)
\\t\\t\\tif tc.expectedErrRegex != \\"\\" {
\\t\\t\\t\\trequire.Error\(t, err\)
\\t\\t\\t\\tassert.Regexp\(t, tc.expectedErrRegex, err.Error\(\)\)
\\t\\t\\t\\treturn
\\t\\t\\t}
\\t\\t\\trequire.NoError\(t, err\)
\\t\\t\\tdefer vs.Close\(\)

\\t\\t\\tgot, iterErr := drainValueSet\(vs\)
\\t\\t\\trequire.NoError\(t, iterErr\)
\\t\\t\\tassert.Equal\(t, tc.expectedValues, got\)'''

new = '''\\t\\t\\tvs, err := q.SearchLabelNames\(ctx, tc.hints\)
\\t\\t\\trequire.NoError\(t, err\)
\\t\\t\\tdefer vs.Close\(\)

\\t\\t\\tgot, iterErr := drainValueSet\(vs\)
\\t\\t\\tif tc.expectedErrRegex != \\"\\" {
\\t\\t\\t\\trequire.Error\(t, iterErr\)
\\t\\t\\t\\tassert.Regexp\(t, tc.expectedErrRegex, iterErr.Error\(\)\)
\\t\\t\\t\\treturn
\\t\\t\\t}
\\t\\t\\trequire.NoError\(t, iterErr\)
\\t\\t\\tif tc.unordered {
\\t\\t\\t\\tassert.ElementsMatch\(t, tc.expectedValues, got\)
\\t\\t\\t} else {
\\t\\t\\t\\tassert.Equal\(t, tc.expectedValues, got\)
\\t\\t\\t}'''

if old in content:
    print\('FOUND'\)
    open\('/Users/andrewhall/Documents/GitHub/mimir/pkg/querier/blocks_store_queryable_search_test.go', 'w'\).write\(content.replace\(old, new, 1\)\)
    print\('REPLACED'\)
else:
    print\('NOT FOUND'\)
    idx = content.find\('SearchLabelNames\(ctx, tc.hints\)'\)
    print\(repr\(content[idx-5:idx+200]\)\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

with open\('/Users/andrewhall/Documents/GitHub/mimir/pkg/storegateway/bucket_test.go', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Replace every occurrence of newStaticSeriesLimiterFactory followed by newline + whitespace + newGapBasedPartitioners
# by inserting func\(\) int { return 0 }, between them, preserving indentation.
# The pattern: \(tabs\)newStaticSeriesLimiterFactory\(...\),\\n\(same-or-more-tabs\)newGapBasedPartitioners

def replacer\(m\):
    series_line = m.group\(1\)  # the full series limiter line including trailing comma and newline
    indent = m.group\(2\)       # indentation of the gap partitioners line
    gap_line = m.group\(3\)     # the gap partitioners line
    return series_line + indent + 'func\(\) int { return 0 },\\n' + indent + gap_line

# Match: <series_limiter_line_with_newline><indent><newGapBasedPartitioners...>
pattern = r'\([ \\t]*newStaticSeriesLimiterFactory\\\([^\)]*\\\),\\n\)\([ \\t]*\)\(newGapBasedPartitioners\\\(\)'

new_content = re.sub\(pattern, replacer, content\)

count = content.count\('newStaticSeriesLimiterFactory'\) 
new_count = new_content.count\('newStaticSeriesLimiterFactory'\)
print\(f"Occurrences of newStaticSeriesLimiterFactory: before={count}, after={new_count}"\)
print\(f"New 'func\(\) int' insertions: {new_content.count\('func\(\) int { return 0 }'\) - content.count\('func\(\) int { return 0 }'\)}"\)

with open\('/Users/andrewhall/Documents/GitHub/mimir/pkg/storegateway/bucket_test.go', 'w'\) as f:
    f.write\(new_content\)
print\("Done"\)
EOF)

Bash(cat > /tmp/debug_main.go << 'EOF'
package main

import \(
    "fmt"
    "github.com/grafana/mimir/pkg/util/validation"
    "github.com/grafana/dskit/flagext"
\)

func main\(\) {
    limits := validation.Limits{}
    flagext.DefaultValues\(&limits\)
    limits.IngesterSearchLabelsValuesMaxSizeBytes = 4
    
    o := validation.NewOverrides\(limits, nil\)
    result := o.IngesterSearchLabelsValuesMaxSizeBytes\("test"\)
    fmt.Printf\("IngesterSearchLabelsValuesMaxSizeBytes = %d\\n", result\)
}
EOF
go run /tmp/debug_main.go 2>&1)
